tier2: Same as tier1 + rarity interaction terms. Train separate model instance (STAT S-03: 4.6x variance ratio).

imputation_notes.set_type: Merge set types with <500 cards into 'other' (spellbook=24, arsenal=17). One-hot encode remaining categories.
imputation_notes.foil_premium: 1.0 means no foil premium data; keep rows where foil_premium < 1.0 (real signal, pre-8th Edition)
imputation_notes.edhrec_rank: NULL (~6% of cards) -> sentinel MAX+1 (31,059); preserves monotonic ordering. Apply log() after sentinel fill.
imputation_notes.mana_value: NULL for Scryfall-only cards (no MTGJson data); impute median within rarity. Cap at 16 (EDA D-09).
imputation_notes.color_identity_count: Bucket as 0 (colorless) / 1 (mono) / 2 (two-color) / 3+ (multi). Non-monotone gradient: colorless highest (Power Nine effect).
imputation_notes.primary_type: One-hot encode: Creature, Instant, Sorcery, Artifact, Enchantment, Land, Planeswalker, Kindred.
imputation_notes.deck_pct_vintage: 0 for non-vintage-tracked cards (sparse: ~0.5% coverage). MTGGoldfish selection bias: tracked cards are pre-selected expensive cards — non-null values correlate with price by construction. Signal direction: r=+0.491 (4th strongest individual signal in EDA). Leakage: SAFE — snapshotted daily, joined date-exact (P-22).
imputation_notes.deck_pct_commander: 0 for non-commander-tracked cards. Inverted signal: r=-0.232 after rarity control (higher commander play does not predict higher price at the oracle level). Tier 1 only — direction is ambiguous for Tier 3 expensive cards.

pending_resolution.price_rank_global: Highest MI (5.33) but near-circular with price level target. Safe per MP-01 (cross-sectional rank, no future data). Re-evaluate MI against log-return target at >=8 snapshots (P-17).
pending_resolution.is_price_spike: Leakage confirmed SAFE (backward-only LAG(1)). Currently 0 for all rows due to UUID linkage bug — add to feature sets once UUID bug is fixed (EDA blocker).
